plugins.changelogTitle:
# M-Eyes Changelog

All notable changes are generated automatically from conventional commits.

plugins.prepareCmd: sed -i 's/__version__ = ".*"/__version__ = "${nextRelease.version}"/' backend/app/version.py && sed -i 's/^version = ".*"/version = "${nextRelease.version}"/' backend/pyproject.toml && cd frontend && npm version ${nextRelease.version} --no-git-tag-version
